program: beat-n (2026-07-18 -> 2026-07-19): NAS-born under both baseline bars

bars.regime: @640, Orin Nano mode 0, locked clocks, fp16 = median-of-3 fresh-timing-cache builds, docker-ps-empty

verdict: BOTH FINALISTS PASS ALL THREE BARS. Champion = cap_a_rl (highest de-noised accuracy; the capacity-max point the measured fp16 margin funded). The recovered-weights ONNX reproduced the weight-free probes to 0.03 ms on every axis (act252 10.74/6.407 vs probe 10.75/6.392; cap_a 11.59/6.765 vs probe 11.62/6.781).

latency: measured-only, single clean session 2026-07-19 (setup -> both finalists -> audit_e2e (1 pre-existing suspect: legacy yolo11s row, documented) -> teardown)
